trustedBy.title: Trainees from Top Global Enterprises and Universities

items.quote: If she stays, it's her work. If she leaves, it's the institution's wealth. We haven't achieved this in 12 years.

about.title: About BEEBEE AI
about.description: BEEBEE AI is an AI technology consulting firm dual-headquartered in New Zealand and China, focusing on AI consulting, implementation, and mentoring. We are committed to translating cutting-edge AI technologies into practical productivity for enterprises, helping them find breakthroughs in the deep waters of intelligent transformation.

founder.title: Founder Introduction
founder.name: Pin Zhou
bio: One of the world's first GPT entrepreneurs, deeply involved in the evolution and commercialization of the AI wave.
25 years of Internet industry experience, with 3 successful entrepreneurial ventures and profound business insights.
Former executive at 2 US-listed companies, well-versed in the pain points of enterprise management, organizational structure, and efficiency optimization.
In the field of AI consulting and training, has empowered 40+ top global enterprises and helped 1000+ workplace elites reshape their competitiveness in the AI era.

generalPainPoints.title: Why Choose BEEBEE AI
generalPainPoints.subtitle: In the deep waters of intelligent transformation, enterprises face three core challenges:

items.title: Vague Strategic Cognition
items.description: Faced with emerging AI technologies, unsure how to deeply integrate them with business, lacking top-level design.

items.title: Implementation Gap
items.description: Understanding concepts but lacking practical experience and hybrid AI talents who understand the business.

items.title: Fragmented System Ecosystem
items.description: Scattered tools failing to create synergy, making it difficult to accumulate exclusive digital assets.

eduPainPoints.title: Education Industry Pain Points
eduPainPoints.subtitle: The most urgent problems enterprises face today, and what we tackle first when engaging a new client:

items.title: Customer Acquisition & Conversion
items.description: From content marketing to contract signing, improving conversion rates by just 1% at each step makes a massive difference in final revenue.

items.title: Low Service Delivery Efficiency
items.description: Employees spend huge amounts of time on repetitive tasks, leaving no energy for high-value work. Important milestones rely on human memory, leading to omissions.

items.title: Difficulty Replicating Experience
items.description: The best employees keep their experience in their heads. New hire training is long and costly, and SOP execution relies on personal memory and discipline.

items.title: Enterprise Implementation
items.description: Industry-level AI implementation and mentoring for Education, Finance, etc. Deep dive into business scenarios, provide customized solutions, and achieve cost reduction and efficiency increase.

items.title: Navigation Coaching
items.description: AI mindset inspiration and coaching for business owners/entrepreneurs. Break cognitive limits, build AI strategic thinking, and lead enterprise intelligent transformation.

items.title: Personal Empowerment
items.description: AI career consulting and training for workplace elites. Help individuals enhance AI skills, reshape workplace competitiveness, and become super individuals in the AI era.

items.title: Enterprise AI Strategy & Tactics
items.description: From top-level strategic design (Strategy) to grassroots tool application (Tactics), providing a complete enterprise-level AI transformation methodology and practical guidance.

items.title: Digital 'Second Brain'
items.description: Based on the CODE (Capture, Organize, Distill, Express) framework, turning scattered personal experiences into sustainable digital assets for the organization.

items.title: OpenClaw Hardware-Software Integration
items.description: The exclusive 'AI Assistant' for your organization. Employees use voice or text to input tasks; it automatically organizes, reminds, and analyzes—no system switching or coding required.

steps.title: Listen to the Problem
steps.description: No rushed proposals. We ask key questions, listen for 40 minutes with only follow-ups, and confirm the first month's entry point.

steps.title: Mine the Experience
steps.description: Structured dialogues with senior staff to reconstruct judgment logic. Recordings are organized into mind maps and methodologies.

steps.title: Bring Experience to Life
steps.description: Load content into OpenClaw, configure automated workflows. Teach staff to build AI workspaces and generate content in bulk.

steps.title: Run the System
steps.description: On-site coaching to solve bottlenecks, expanding to more departments monthly. New hires work independently; the organization gains replicable standards.

eduResults.title: Clear Changes After 6 Months of Cooperation

eduCaseStudy.title: Taking a K12 Institution with 3 Campuses and 40 Teachers as an Example
eduCaseStudy.subtitle: Assuming your institution has 3 campuses, about 40 teachers and consultants, and an annual revenue of about 10 million RMB, here are the expected improvements in various scenarios:

tableData.effect: Same manpower, content output increased by 5-10 times; equivalent to saving the labor cost of 1-2 full-time content positions (about 80-150k RMB/year).
Daily effective follow-up per consultant increased from 2 to 7; 72-hour follow-up rate increased from less than 50% to over 95%.
With reception mind maps and prompt cards, new consultant signing rates approach senior levels; overall on-site signing rate expected to increase by 10-20%.
New course design cycle shortened from 3-4 weeks to under 1 week; each teacher saves about 200 hours of repetitive design time annually.
Message response dropped from 40 mins to 5 mins; renewal reminders no longer missed, renewal rate expected to increase by 5-10%.
Experience of 3-5 core employees forms a reusable knowledge base; new hire training cycle shortened from 3 months to 6 weeks.

eduMethodology.title: Core Methodology: CODE Framework
eduMethodology.subtitle: Helping educational institutions turn scattered personal experiences into sustainable digital assets for the organization.

items.name: Capture
items.desc: Strongly build a multimodal knowledge base. Supports text, audio/video, WeChat records, OCR images, and full website imports.

items.name: Organize
items.desc: Manage knowledge clearly, accurately, and flexibly. Combine multiple knowledge bases, provide error correction for audio/video documents.

items.name: Distill
items.desc: Automatically distill and transform knowledge. Original keyword graphs make content focus clear; automatically construct global question engines.

items.name: Express
items.desc: Express knowledge accurately and effectively. Q&A accurately matches preset answers, knowledge base cites files and traces paragraphs.

eduCooperation.title: What We Need From You During Cooperation

tasks: Arrange 3-5 core employees for interviews (~3 hrs each)
Provide existing business processes and SOP documents
Employees spend 5 mins daily using OpenClaw to input work info
Management spends 15 mins weekly reviewing data dashboards
Participate in monthly reviews with the on-site consultant
System integrated into daily routine, no extra effort needed
New hires automatically enter standardized workflows
